assertion_results.text: Validation identifies that the Bug description is missing the Steps to Reproduce section (required by bug-template-mock.md) (Step 1)

assertion_results.text: The skill stops execution after identifying missing sections — it does NOT proceed to Steps 2-5 (Step 1 stop rule)
assertion_results.evidence: validation-result.md line 36 states: 'Execution stops at Step 1. Steps 2 through 5 (severity/priority assessment, task decomposition, effort estimation, and Jira updates) are not performed.' No investigation, root cause, or task description outputs were produced.

assertion_results.text: The error message lists the specific missing sections and references the Bug template path from Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: validation-result.md lines 28-30 list the two specific missing sections (Steps to Reproduce and Expected Result) with their heading formats. Line 7 references the bug template path: 'Bug template path (from Bug Configuration): docs/templates/bug-template.md'. Line 38 states: 'The reporter must update ACME-501 to include the missing sections per the bug template (docs/templates/bug-template.md) before triage can proceed.'
